description_long: This object is a semi-automatic handgun with a robust, utilitarian design, featuring a matte black finish across its metal slide and polymer frame. The grip is ergonomically contoured with a textured surface for secure handling, and the trigger guard is rounded and slightly thickened for added protection. The barrel is of medium length, extending slightly beyond the slide, and appears to be unthreaded with a smooth exterior. The magazine protrudes from the grip, indicating a double-stack design, and the slide has minimal visible markings or engravings. The overall construction suggests durability and functionality, suitable for law enforcement or civilian use in urban environments.
description: A matte black semi-automatic handgun with a textured ergonomic grip, rounded trigger guard, and a protruding magazine.
description_view_0: Side profile showing the full length of the slide, grip texture, and the magazine extending from the grip.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the circular barrel opening and the narrow profile of the slide and frame.
description_view_2: Opposite side profile displaying the slide, grip, and magazine, mirroring the details of the first side.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the back of the grip and slide, with the hammer and rear sight area visible.
attribute_grip_design: The grip is moderately contoured with a pronounced palm swell and a checkered texture pattern for enhanced traction. It appears to be made of black polymer, providing a matte, non-slip surface. The sides of the grip are slightly curved to fit the hand comfortably, and there are subtle finger grooves along the front strap. No visible logos or embellishments are present, emphasizing a functional, utilitarian design.
attribute_trigger_guard_style: The trigger guard is rounded and robust, with a slightly thickened profile for added strength. It is of standard size, providing ample space for finger placement, and features a smooth finish without any undercuts or squared-off edges. There are no visible texturing or integrated accessories, maintaining a classic and practical appearance.
attribute_barrel_type: The barrel is of medium length, extending just beyond the slide, with a smooth, unthreaded exterior. It has a standard cylindrical profile and lacks any visible compensators, ports, or suppressor threads. The finish matches the matte black of the slide, and no external markings are apparent.
attribute_slide_markings: There are no clearly visible markings, engravings, or inscriptions on the slide. The surface appears plain and unadorned, with no manufacturer logos, model names, serial numbers, or decorative patterns evident in the images.
attribute_magazine_base_shape: The magazine base is flat and flush with the bottom of the grip, with a slight bevel at the edges for easier insertion and removal. It lacks any finger rests, flaring, or visible logos, maintaining a simple and functional design.
